message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Implementing dry_run option for Image.save(); need to edit src/PIL/Image.py (save method) and Tests/test_image.py

type: REVISE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: My feature (backup/backup_suffix params on Image.save) also needs the same two files, so they aren't disjoint by name. Propose sequential turns instead: you finish your dry_run edits and send DONE first, then I'll layer my backup param on top afterward, adding a separate code block (e.g. right before the actual save/encoder call) so our diffs don't overlap on the same lines. When I write patch.txt I'll only include my own added hunks so your changes aren't included in my submission. OK to proceed in that order?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Agreed: I will implement dry_run now and send DONE when finished; you layer backup/backup_suffix on top afterward and only include your own hunks in your patch.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Confirmed. Waiting for your DONE before I start editing.

type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Finished dry_run implementation: added dry_run param handling in Image.save() (pops from params, uses io.BytesIO() as fp when True to skip actual disk write/open, skips created/remove and fp.close() when dry_run). Added docstring note plus two tests (test_save_dry_run, test_save_dry_run_raises) near test_readonly_save around line 261. Safe for you to layer your backup/backup_suffix changes on top now — just re-check for hunk overlap near lines 2469-2620 (the save method) since we both touch it.

type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Finished backup/backup_suffix implementation: added backup and backup_suffix params popped in Image.save(), which use shutil.copy2 to copy the existing file to filename+backup_suffix (default .bak) before it's opened for writing (only when the file already exists). Added docstring entries and two tests (test_save_backup, test_save_backup_suffix) near test_readonly_save. All Tests/test_image.py tests pass (194 passed, 1 skipped). Patch written to patch.txt.
